essence: Performs laboratory tests, prepares samples, and maintains equipment to support scientific research and diagnostics.

identity.title: Laboratory Technician
identity.summary: Prepares reagents, runs assays, records results, and ensures laboratory quality and safety standards are met.

salary.notes: Specialist technicians in clinical or research labs may earn higher pay.

qualifications: Laboratory qualification or relevant technical training
Experience with lab techniques and equipment
Attention to detail and good record keeping
Understanding of health & safety and quality systems

lifestyle.description: Laboratory environment with routine testing, sample handling, and strict adherence to protocols and documentation.

habits: Runs assays and records results accurately
